description: FS6000 cargo X-ray scanner adapter. Watches a directory for completed scan sets — three sibling .img files ({stem}high.img, {stem}low.img, {stem}material.img). Decodes the 36-byte header + big-endian payload, vertically flips to vendor orientation, renders a percentile-normalized grayscale PNG preview from the high-energy channel.

WatchPath.description: Absolute path the adapter polls for completed scan sets. Each scan is a set of three sibling .img files with matching stem (e.g. 0001high.img, 0001low.img, 0001material.img).

PollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to scan WatchPath for new completed sets.

PreviewPercentileLow.description: Lower percentile clip (0–49) used when normalizing the 16-bit high-energy channel to 8-bit grayscale.

PreviewPercentileHigh.description: Upper percentile clip (51–100) used when normalizing the 16-bit high-energy channel to 8-bit grayscale.
